title: 3D Hands
description: Renders the player hands in the iconic 3D style used by most classic Minecraft animations from back in the day.
body: ![downloads](https://img.shields.io/badge/dynamic/json?url=https%3A%2F%2Fconnorcode.com%2Fapi%2Fdownloads%3Fmodrinth%3DOORXn0mW%26curseforge%3D1297449&query=%24%5B%27total-human%27%5D&label=downloads&style=for-the-badge&color=0dc362) This mod enables rendering of the player hands in the iconic 3D style used by most classic Minecraft animations from back in the day. ## 🔵 DEPENDENCIES - [Entity Model Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features) (2.4 or above) ## 🟢 COMPATIBILITES - [3D Skin Layers](https://modrinth.com/mod/3dskinlayers) - [3D Armor](https://modrinth.com/mod/armor-3d) - [Better Combat](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-combat) - [Not Enough Animations](https://modrinth.com/mod/not-enough-animations) - [First-person Model](https://modrinth.com/mod/first-person-model) ## 🔴 INCOMPATIBILITES - [Fresh Moves](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/tras-fresh-player) - [Epic Fight](https://modrinth.com/mod/epic-fight) - [Detailed Animations](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/detailed-animations) ## NEED A SERVER?
